title: theresia pudica
side_effects: Theresia pudica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset due to its high alkaloid content. In rare cases, excessive consumption may lead to respiratory issues, including shortness of breath and coughing. Additionally, some individuals may experience allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, when handling the plant or using its extracts. If not handled carefully, the plant's toxic compounds can be absorbed through the skin, potentially causing irritation and burns.
